title: Custom Ranks
description: A resource pack for Minecraft Java that adds custom ranks. Fully customizable.
body:
Custom Ranks
A resource pack for Minecraft Java and Bedrock that adds custom ranks like Better Ranks for ItemsAdder. This pack is a better option becuase all the ranks are free and easy to download. There is no need for a plugin, just a resource pack.

## Key Features
- Custom Ranks
- Editable png's when extracted

## Ranks
![A preview of all the ranks typed in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c57a2ec7c64367284c2a98304746115c0696a2.png)

## Symbols
Copy these into a chat formatting or permissions plugin as a prefix or suffix.
